items.title: Solana: Why SEC’s tokenized equity move matters for SOL’s $2.6B RWA boom
items.whyYouShouldCare: The SEC's tokenized equity initiative could enhance Solana's appeal in the real-world asset sector, potentially driving increased liquidity and usage.

items.title: XRP and Solana funds attract inflows as bitcoin outflows hit nearly $1 billion
items.whyYouShouldCare: Increased inflows to XRP and Solana funds indicate growing investor confidence, which may positively impact SOL's market positioning amid broader market outflows.

items.title: Crypto funds see $1B in outflows as Iran tensions revive risk-off sentiment
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $1 billion outflow from crypto funds highlights a risk-off sentiment, which could pressure liquidity across the ecosystem, affecting SOL's performance.
